headlines.headline: Crevex Labs reports unexpected decline in Latin America revenue

sentiment.reasoning: An unexpected decline in revenue from a specific region indicates a negative financial performance that will likely impact earnings.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
